title: Observatorio de Precios Cítrícolas en Andalucía
description: This data model is designed to record, analyze and standardize the economic quotations and market prices of the citrus sector (oranges, mandarins, lemons, grapefruits, among others) in Andalusia from 2010 to 2025

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity Type. It has to be CitrusPriceObservatory.

startWeek.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Start date of the reference week.

endWeek.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. End date of the reference week.

group.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Agricultural group associated with the product.

sector.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Agricultural sector associated with the product.

subSector.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Subsector associated with the product.

product.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Commercial name of the agricultural product.

typeProduct.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Type or classification of the product.

subtypeProduct.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. More specific classification or subtype of the product.

position.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Position of the product within the commercialization chain.

category.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Commercial quality category assigned to the product.

format.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Commercial presentation or packaging format of the product.

channel.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Marketing or distribution channel where the price was recorded.

price.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units: 'EUR/kg'. Market price of the product during the reference week.

unit.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'. Unit of measurement used to express the reported price.

year.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units: 'YYYY'. Year corresponding to the market price.

week.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units: 'WW'. Calendar week corresponding to the market price.
